claim: RL-controlled thermodynamic cascades outperform static and greedy baselines
evidence: This test requires GPU to train a PPO agent on a 3-stage thermodynamic cascade simulation. No GPU available in this session.
what_is_needed: Implement 3-stage thermodynamic cascade with paper equations. Run three strategies: (1) static allocation, (2) greedy efficiency maximization, (3) PPO. Compare total power output, efficiency, and entropy loss across constant and stochastic demand scenarios. PPO must outperform both baselines on at least 2 of 3 metrics.
implications_for_other_papers: If this test eventually FAILS (greedy matches PPO), Paper 11 is shelved. No impact on other papers — AIECS is standalone.
